name: AUTOSOMAL DOMINANT POLYCYSTIC DISEASE
definition: POLYCYSTIC LIVER DISEASE part of spectrum of fibropolycystic liver disease

demographics.Etiology: biliary ductal plate malformation at the level of the small intrahepatic bile ducts with

dominant_finding: enlarged diffusely cystic liver: cysts of 1 mm - 12 cm in diameter
distribution: ± diffuse dilatation of intra- and extrahepatic bile ducts
discriminating_features: enlarged diffusely cystic liver: cysts of 1 mm - 12 cm in diameter
calcifications of cyst wall ← hemorrhage / infection
± diffuse dilatation of intra- and extrahepatic bile ducts

general: enlarged diffusely cystic liver: cysts of 1 mm - 12 cm in diameter
calcifications of cyst wall ← hemorrhage / infection
± diffuse dilatation of intra- and extrahepatic bile ducts

clinical.Cx: infection, compression, bleeding, rupture of cysts
